[Home](https://carelabz.com/cn/) /[Blog](https://carelabz.com/cn/blog) /[Why Are Harmonic Analysis and Research Crucial for Chinese Businesses?](https://carelabz.com/cn/why-are-harmonic-analysis-and-research-crucial-for-chinese-businesses/)

## Why Are Harmonic Analysis and Research Crucial for Chinese Businesses?

Harmonics are a significant topic in a power system since they impact both the quality of the energy and the performance of the equipment. High harmonic levels may cause overheating of components and limit the device’s lifespan. Pure sinusoidal waves created by a perfect power source are twisted by harmonics. Harmonic distortion hinders a company’s capacity for production and operation. Here are some economic impacts of harmonic distortion.

- Harmonics lead to increased component losses (Joule effect).
- The existence of harmonics causes an increase in subscription power, which increases customer service expenses.
- Equipment size is excessive owing to a diminished power supply.
- When the amount of distortion approaches 10%, the lifespan of several components is shortened and productivity falls.
- Harmonics introduce peak currents, which results in output losses and dramatically increases the time necessary to restore system performance.

#### Table of Contents

![Why Are Harmonic Analysis and Research Crucial for Japanese Businesses-1](https://carelabz.com/cn/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/getimg_ai_img-Hs8CkL9NiQHrmCtViO62j-1.png)

### Inspirations in Harmonics:

Nonlinear loads that consume current in irregular, brief bursts generate harmonics. These pulses interrupt the current waves they generate, allowing harmonic currents to circulate throughout the whole power system. In industrial applications, harmonics impair the efficiency and quality of electrical power. Most organizations have electrical infrastructure that can safely manage nonlinear loads of up to 15 percent. Negative harmonic distortions may arise if the percentage of nonlinear loads exceeds 15%. Consequently, it is essential to monitor harmonic levels to ensure they remain within the allowed ranges. Consequently, harmonic inquiry and analysis helps retain knowledge of potential dangers and their core causes, making it simpler to avoid harmonic-related issues throughout the design process and decreasing the likelihood of unintended consequences.

![Why Are Harmonic Analysis and Research Crucial for Japanese Businesses-2](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==)

### Employing Harmonic Analysis as a Resource:

Despite the minimal chance of harmonic issues, a timely harmonic analysis must be performed to guarantee that the harmonic levels are suitable. These are the harmonic level progressions:

- Obtaining an electrical one-line diagram and identifying any potential nonlinear loads is the initial step.
- The image emphasizes the position of the shared link (PCC).
- In system buses, plants that are susceptible to distortion are emphasized.
- All information pertaining to harmonics has been acquired.
- Obtain from utility companies the established PCC values, including the maximum and minimum levels of short-circuit faults and the current and voltage harmonics authorized.
- A simulated harmonic analysis is conducted using publicly available software.
- Analyze the harmonics of the electrical system.
- Find the bus and PCC’s discrete and overall discrete current and voltage aberrations. Create a spectrum of harmonic frequencies.
- Pick appropriate harmonic control strategies. Harmonic distortion surpasses the acceptable thresholds.
- Once mitigating variables have been accounted for, the harmonic analysis should be repeated.

CareLabs is an authorized provider of harmonic analysis and research. Experienced professionals can undertake accurate, risk-free testing to identify levels of troublesome harmonics and can assist in maintaining harmonics at optimum levels without causing further issues.

![Why Are Harmonic Analysis and Research Crucial for Japanese Businesses-2](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==)

### CareLabs Service Benefits:

- Safer electrical systems that comply with regulatory requirements.
- Fully integrated power systems save both time and money.
- Establish a more secure workplace
- Provide easy-to-implement solutions when a circumstance calls for them.
- Increase the margins of safety
- By producing arc flash labels and work permits automatically, you may save time.
- Avoid potential penalties and legal fees.

CareLabs has personnel stationed in many areas to ensure that our specialists are available in case of a regular or urgent emergency. While swiftly establishing itself as an ISO 9001:2008-accredited organization, CareLabs has amassed a clientele with a formidable reputation and excellent evaluations. CareLabs offers research and analysis services for harmonics in major cities, including Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Shenzhen.
